hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'gh.*pr.*create' && echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|\s)--draft(\s|$)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Draft PRs are not allowed per CLAUDE.md. Remove --draft to open as ready for review."}}'; fi
